name: Claude Code
description: Anthropic's CLI coding assistant. OAuth/subscription login persists across container rebuilds.

apiKey.description: `sk-ant-…` for API auth; empty for OAuth login on first run.

permissionMode.description: Default Claude permission mode in this container. `bypass` runs without a prompt on every action (reasonable inside the isolated container — the container is the safety boundary); `ask` prompts as usual. Monoceros writes this to ~/.claude/settings.json on apply; override per-project or with a CLI flag.

lines.text: Anthropic Claude Code CLI (`claude`) — interactive coding assistant. Authenticated via OAuth/subscription unless `apiKey` was set, in which case it runs in API-key mode.
